title: Tile
description: A tile on a Power BI dashboard

id.description: The unique identifier of the tile

title.description: The display title of the tile

embedUrl.description: The embed URL for the tile

embedData.description: Additional embed data for the tile

reportId.description: The ID of the report the tile is pinned from

datasetId.description: The ID of the dataset used by this tile

rowSpan.description: The number of rows the tile spans

colSpan.description: The number of columns the tile spans
